_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Optimize mix of collection assets and resources to increase effectiveness and efficiency against essential information associated with priority intelligence requirements.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in managing data and AI investment portfolios across multiple concurrent initiatives, including prioritization frameworks, resource allocation, portfolio performance tracking, and initiative rebalancing.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI LS domain. LS-S-012 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AB-T-007 (AB, cosine: 0.493), DQ-A-001 (DQ, cosine: 0.491).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.6/10 (raw 0.562). No substantive shared vocabulary — relationship is purely semantic. DCWF-only terms [against, assets, associated, collection, effectiveness, efficiency] vs WIDAI-only terms [across, ai, allocation, concurrent, data, frameworks] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.857 (P=0.858, R=0.856). Balanced P/R — the 20-word DCWF element and 23-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: mixed signal (E:48.5%, N:51.4%, C:0.1%). No dominant classification for "Optimize mix of collection assets and resources to increase effectiveness and ef" vs "Skill in managing data and AI investment portfolios across multiple concurrent i" — the relationship is genuinely ambiguous from a logical inference perspective.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.515 ≈ STS 0.562 (gap 0.047). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [none] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 2.5%. Zero substantive shared tokens. The entire relationship is semantic — no lexical trace. DCWF terms: [against, assets, associated, collection, effectiveness, efficiency]. WIDAI terms: [across, ai, allocation, concurrent, data, frameworks].
